column2: How many employees does your company or organization have?
column3: Is your employer primarily a tech company/organization?
column4: Does your employer provide mental health benefits as part of healthcare coverage?
column5: Does your employer offer resources to learn more about mental health disorders and options for seeking help?
column6: Would you feel comfortable discussing a mental health issue with your direct supervisor(s)?
column7: Do you believe your productivity is ever affected by a mental health issue?
column8: If yes, what percentage of your work time (time performing primary or secondary job functions) is affected by a mental health issue?
column9: Do you currently have a mental health disorder?
column12: What country do you live in?
